title: Hermetic and Magical Currents
subtitle: Hermeticism, natural magic, and the emblematic turn
directive: theme map: hermeticism, magia-naturalis, prisca-theologia, emblem-alchemy, emblematic-alchemy

narrative.intro: The learned-magical penumbra of alchemy: the Corpus Hermeticum's fortunes, magia naturalis, and the emblem books that turned laboratory doctrine into images.
narrative.provenance_note: Themes = hermeticism (13), magia-naturalis (7), prisca-theologia, emblem-alchemy, emblematic-alchemy. A thin slice — the corpus under-tags conceptual themes (see AUDIT.md). Events from the ALCHEMYTIMELINEMAP corpus (largely draft-status); locations are event geocodes, not residences. Absence on this map reflects gaps in the record.
narrative.design_note: Lapis & Gold: Hermetic learning claimed starry, priestly authority; ultramarine and gilt make the map read like the ceiling of a chapel.
